name: 04-28-character-card-import
title: SillyTavern Character Card Import
description: Implement SillyTavern character card import supporting JSON and PNG formats.
creator: lijin
notes: Implemented: SillyTavern V2/V3 JSON, PNG tEXt chunk, CharX, Risu, TavernAI older format. PNG embedding for metadata. 22784 bytes comprehensive parser.
